title: CEBPA-mutated AML
question: Which CEBPA finding is associated with a favourable biological subgroup?
correct_answer: A. Pathogenic bZIP/in-frame CEBPA mutation profile.
explanation: Current classifications recognise specific pathogenic CEBPA mutation patterns as defining a favourable subgroup.
references: WHO Classification of Haematolymphoid Tumours, 5th edition
